entry.title: Re: While seeing the preview in the fiori app im getting the error message
entry.content: Is this SAP Public cloud or Private cloud issue?

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Identity Access Governance (IAG) integration with Identity Authentication Service (IAS
entry.content:
hi Muthu, 

When we create subaccount for IAG, do we need to create a subaccount for IPS as well?

entry.title: Re: SAP Encryption Key - Database - SSFS
entry.content:
When you run:


rsecssfx generatekey -getPlainValueToConsole
It generates a random symmetric key used for internal encryption purposes in SAP (example: for credentials, connection passwords).

generated key is 256-bit AES key (32 bytes, hex-encoded).

Typically printed as a 64-character hexadecimal string (each byte = 2 hex digits).

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Email output completed in system but not sent from sa...
entry.content:
Hi,

Screen shots would have helped but without it, these are just guesses.

Please check if the email channel was enabled in output parameter determination and if it has been activated. In the manage billing document app, under the output items check if the output is related to the email channel or just IDOC. Also, check to confirm that exclusive indicator is not set on the previous channels in the list.

If the email channel is not showing up then it was not configured right. You can also check the monitor email transmission app to see if the item was created for the output. 

Please review https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a630d57fc5004c6383e7a81efee7a8bb/c9b98e682223453b9185d11de90670ac.html as well.

If all of these are in place and its still not working, you can raise a ticket to SAP

 

Regards,

Dennis

entry.title: Re: Custom tile & catalog in S/4HANA Public Cloud (2SL-SB)
entry.content:
In 2SL, you cannot create a truly "new" custom catalog; you can only extend very limited fields or work inside a Developer Extensibility framework.

Alternatives :- 

1. Use a separate portal or SAP Build Work Zone

  • You could expose an SAP Build Work Zone or SAP BTP Launchpad Service.

  • Create a tile there that points to SAP IAG.

  • Users would only access BTP Portal, not S/4 directly → no S/4 license needed until assigned.

2. SAP IAG Link Outside S/4 (Email / External Site)

  • Send new hires an email with a link directly to SAP IAG.

  • After approval and role provisioning is complete, then they get their S/4 Launchpad access.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Delta in DataFlows in SAP Datasphere
entry.content: Data flows don't support delta capabilities, you can schedule it to run multiple times but no delta tracking.

entry.title: Re: A journey from Netweaver 7.50 to S/4HANA - Part 1: Setting the Stage
entry.content:
Hi Bärbel 

Good luck with the migration. 😉.

Edith

entry.title: Re: Transporting cross client object- generated from SLXT
entry.content:
Hello,

If your Transport is released ;

you can go to STMS_IMPORT --> EXTRAS--> OTHER REQUESTS--> ADD ; here add the transport of copies requests and select Import Again.

Your TR will e added in the list.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Why can't I configure Generative AI Hub in AI Launch...
entry.content:
I have learned that there is no free tier option for Gen AI hub services. So, with the service plans below it will work and charges apply accordingly. 

 AI core (Extended) and  AI launchpad (Standard)

entry.title: Re: Interesting stuff you find when running S/4HANA Readiness Checks
entry.content:
Hi Bärbel,

Thanks for the Input 

I also like to use FU, etc they are still there and working..

So I will start a run in my little SAP System.

Cheers Edith

entry.title: Oracle DB TCPS Connection issue - Integration Suite
entry.content:
I am trying to connect to an On-Prem Oracle 19c DB in Integration Suite. 
Cloud Connector connectivity is fine.
I tried the following:
 
1. JDBC URL provided (Old style Full Address format):
This URL was provided in the JDBC Material, Oracle driver was also installed
 pod1234.test-testing.com is a virtual host
 
jdbc:oracle:thin:@(DESCRIPTION=(ADDRESS=(PROTOCOL=tcps)(HOST=pod1234.test-testing.com)(PORT=1539))(CONNECT_DATA=(SERVICE_NAME=TEST_ABC3)))
 
Outcome: fails with error com.sap.it.rt.adapter.jdbc.exceptions.JDBCException: Error while getting Datasource Service: ServiceReference is null
 
2. Tried EZCONNECT Style since I think Full Address format is not supported: 
a) jdbc:oracle:thin:@tcps:pod1234.test-testing.com:1539/TEST_ABC3?oracle.net.ssl_server_cert_dn="CN=pod1234a"
b) jdbc:oracle:thin:@tcps://pod1234.test-testing.com:1539/TEST_ABC3?oracle.net.ssl_server_cert_dn="CN=pod1234a"
 
Outcome: fails with the same error com.sap.it.rt.adapter.jdbc.exceptions.JDBCException: Error while getting Datasource Service: ServiceReference is null
 
The following URL worked fine: 
3. jdbc:oracle:thin:@pod1234.test-testing.com:1521/TEST_ABC3
but this is using the TCP protocol, and I want to connect using the TCPS protocol.
 
Please note that the cloud connector configuration is working fine; I don't think there is a problem here.
Additionally, I had also uploaded the certificate required for the TCPS connection SSL handshake in the Monitor > "Integration and APIs" > Keystore.
 
In the local system using DB Client DataGrip, I was able to connect using all the above URLs, but in Integration Suite, I am getting the error.
 
Please suggest what could be the issue.

entry.title: Re: Customer Engagement Initiative 2025 on Business Event Logging
entry.content:
Very interesting and useful content, thank you!

Would you recommend to use Business Event Logging in case of a business requirement to track changes to certain critical sales order header/item fields? The best case scenario would be also to have alerting (e.g. email) for this kind of changes.

I have played with BEL a little, and while it looks really powerful, it seems a bit away from my business requirement. It rather provides complete information about ALL changes to sales orders and their quantity, than giving granular information about the particular critical fields.

Best Regards
Alexander

entry.title: Enter to know Probo-referral-code: "ap37pv"
entry.content:
Enter to know Probo-referral-code: "ap37pv" to get 245.

Enter to know Probo-referral-code: "ap37pv" to get 245.

entry.title: Updating Dimension Attributes in a model
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I request some help with a requirement to incorporate YTD Gross values from external files into tax calculations. Currently, YTD values are derived from monthly wages in the system, but we now need to use the YTD from the file for the last month of each quarter.

  1. Flow:

    • For March 2025, overwrite the YTD value with the file’s YTD.

    • For April 2025, calculate YTD as (March’s file YTD + April’s SAC-calculated wage).

  2. Approach Followed:

    • Step 1: Load the file into the “Actual” version, mapping Employee ID, Period, and YTD to dimensions/measures. Default values (e.g., 1900-01-01, #) are used for missing attributes like dates, company code, shift, etc.

    • Step 2: Use a data action to copy from “Actual” to “Working Forecast,” assigning dimension values from master data.

    • Step 3: Shift data is pulled from a different model using LINK (since it’s absent in master data).

  3. Issue: Company code is not in master data but exists in the same model under a different data source. Attempts to use RESULTLOOKUP failed.

Code Snippet:

// Define Membersets
MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = "SALARY"
MEMBERSET [d/GL_ACCOUNT] = ("EMP_SALARY")
MEMBERSET [d/MEASURE_TYPE] = "M00"
MEMBERSET [d/TIME] = %CutOffMonth%
 
// 1. Copy value from Actual/PROLL_YTD_GROSS to CALC-REG/SS_YTD5
DATA(
// Target Context
[d/DATASRC] = "CALC-REG", [d/GL_ACCOUNT] = "SS_YTD5", [d/TIME] = PREVIOUS(1, "MONTH", [d/TIME]),
// Populate Dimensions from Master Data
[d/START_DATE] = [d/EMPLOYEE].[p/ST_DATE_FORMATTED], [d/COSTCENTER] = [d/EMPLOYEE].[p/COSTCENTER],
[d/EMPSTAT] = [d/EMPLOYEE].[p/POS_STAT],
// Explicit Empty Dimensions
[d/END_DATE] = "", [d/TERM_DATE] = ""
) =
ROUND(
  RESULTLOOKUP(
   [d/VERSION] = "public.Actual", [d/DATASRC] = "PROLL_YTD_GROSS",
   [d/TIME] = PREVIOUS(1, "MONTH", [d/TIME]), [d/SHIFT] = "#"
  ), 2)
* ((
LINK(
[SHIFT_MAPPING], [d/Version] = "public.Update Shift", [d/Date] = "202301", [d/EMP_CLASS] = "#",
[d/EMP_TYPE] = "#", [d/SHIFT_CODE] = "#", [d/WORK_SCHEDULE] = "#"
) * 0
   ) + 1)
 
Any inputs would be greatly helpful.
 
Thanks in Advance,
Phani

entry.title: SAP MDK - search filter does not work for some letters of the Czech diacritics
entry.content:
Hello, in SAP Asset Manager, MDK 24.4.3, the search filter (in pages like FunctionalLocationListViewPage) does not work for special Czech characters 'Č' and 'Ú'. For example, word "ústí" works OK, but "Ústí" does not.

this is in filter: `substringof('${searchString.toLowerCase()}', tolower(FuncLocDesc))`

Are there any settings or other functions so that the special characters are recognized correctly?

entry.title: Re: Time Type Validations based on a separate limit for different event or leave reasons
entry.content:
Great post! Thanks for the very detailed explanation. 

I have a scenario where an employee goes on maternity leave followed by parental leave and the manager should be notified 30 days before the employee return from LOA. Say for instance an employee applied for maternity leave from 15, August 2025 - 5, Feb 2026 followed by parental leave from 6 Feb 2026 to 30 March 2027. The system should only consider 30 March 2027 as expected return date and an alert should be triggered 30 days before the expected return date. How can I achieve this?

entry.title: Re: Role Name and Family from Job Profile Builder on Employee Profile/EC/Job Info
entry.content: Hi,

entry.title: Re: Role Name and Family from Job Profile Builder on Employee Profile/EC/Job Info
entry.content: Hi, would like to know if you were able to achieve this requirement. If yes, how

entry.title: Employee goes on maternity leave followed by parental leave and the manager should be notified
entry.content: I have a scenario where an employee goes on maternity leave followed by parental leave and the manager should be notified 30 days before the employee return from LOA. Say for instance an employee applied for maternity leave from 10 October 2024 - 5, Feb 2025 followed by parental leave from 6 Feb 2025 to 8 April 2026. The system should only consider 8 April 2026 as expected return date and an alert should be triggered 30 days before the expected return date.  ( Some employees take only maternity leave or parental leave). Is this achievable?  How?

entry.title: Error while connecting sap UI5 Application in BAS using Firebase
entry.content:
this is the error

 

 

This is Index.html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge">
    <title>App Title</title>
    <style>
        html, body, body > div, #container, #container-uiarea {
            height: 100%;
        }
    </style>
    <script
        id="sap-ui-bootstrap"
        src="resources/sap-ui-core.js"
        data-sap-ui-theme="sap_horizon"
        data-sap-ui-resourceroots='{
            "firebaselogin": "./"
        }'
        data-sap-ui-oninit="module:sap/ui/core/ComponentSupport"
        data-sap-ui-compatVersion="edge"
        data-sap-ui-async="true"
        data-sap-ui-frameOptions="trusted"
    ></script>
    <script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/7.14.5/firebase-app.js"></script>
    Firebase SDK for Analytics -->
    <script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/7.14.5/firebase-analytics.js"></script>
    <!-- Add Firebase products that you want to use -->
    <script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/7.14.5/firebase-auth.js"></script>
    <script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/7.14.5/firebase-firestore.js"></script>
    <script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/7.14.5/firebase-database.js"></script>
    <script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/7.23.0/firebase-storage.js"></script>
    <script src="https://www.gstatic.com/firebasejs/7.8.0/firebase-functions.js"></script>
    <script>
        // Your Firebase configuration
        var firebaseConfig = {
            apiKey: "",
                authDomain: "",
                projectId: "",
                storageBucket: "",
                messagingSenderId: "",
                appId: ""
        };
               firebase.initializeApp(firebaseConfig);
    </script>
</head>
<body class="sapUiBody sapUiSizeCompact" id="content">
    <div
        data-sap-ui-component
        data-name="firebaselogin"
        data-id="container"
        data-settings='{"id" : "firebaselogin"}'
        data-handle-validation="true"
    ></div>
</body>
</html>

This is component.js

sap.ui.define([
    "sap/ui/core/UIComponent",
    "firebaselogin/model/models",
    "firebaselogin/js/Firebase"
], (UIComponent, models, Firebase) => {
    "use strict";

    return UIComponent.extend("firebaselogin.Component", {
        metadata: {
            manifest: "json",
            interfaces: [
                "sap.ui.core.IAsyncContentCreation"
            ]
        },

        init() {
            // call the base component's init function
            UIComponent.prototype.init.apply(this, arguments);

            // set the device model
            this.setModel(models.createDeviceModel(), "device");

            // enable routing
            this.getRouter().initialize();

            //set Firebase Model
            this.setModel(Firebase.initializeFirebase(), "fbModel");

            
        }
    });
});

this is firebase.js

sap.ui.define([
    "sap/ui/model/json/JSONModel",
], function (JSONModel) {
    "use strict";
    return {
        // Firebase-config retrieved from the Firebase-console
        initializeFirebase: function () {
            // Replace with your config here
            

            const firebaseConfig = {
                apiKey: "",
                authDomain: "",
                projectId: "",
                storageBucket: "",
                messagingSenderId: "",
                appId: ""
               
              };


            // Initialize Firebase with the Firebase-config
            firebase.initializeApp(firebaseConfig);

            // Create a Firestore reference
            const firestore = firebase.firestore();

            // Create a Authentication reference
            const fireAuth = firebase.auth();

            // Get Firebase Instance
            const oFirestore = firebase.firestore;

            // Create a Fire Storage reference
            const fireStorage = firebase.storage();

            // Create a Fire Functions reference
            const fireFunctions = firebase.app().functions('asia-east2');

            // Firebase services object
            const oFirebase = {
                firestore: firestore,
                fireAuth: fireAuth,
                oFirestore: oFirestore,
                fireStorage: fireStorage,
                fireFunctions: fireFunctions
            };

            // Create a Firebase model out of the oFirebase service object which contains all required Firebase services
            var fbModel = new JSONModel(oFirebase);

            // Return the Firebase Model
            return fbModel;
        }
    };
});

this is view1.view.xml

<mvc:View controllerName="firebaselogin.controller.View1"
    xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc"
    xmlns="sap.m">
    <pages>
                <Page id="page" title="Email and Password Login Integration in SAP UI5 using Google Firebase">
                    <content>
                        <VBox height="100%" alignItems="Center">
                            <HBox height="100%" alignItems="Center">
                                <Image height="100px" class="sapUiLargeMarginEnd"
                                    src="https://www.loc-online.co.uk/berkshire-loc/wp-content/uploads/sites/23/2020/06/Screenshot-2020-05-28-at-16.35.37-266x300.png"/>
                                <IconTabBar id="idIconTabBarNoIcons" expanded="{device>/isNoPhone}" selectedKey="mail" class="sapUiResponsiveContentPadding">
                                    <items>
                                        <IconTabFilter text="Email Login" key="mail">
                                            <VBox id="idMailDetails">
                                                <Label design="Bold" text="Enter Registered Email ID" required="true"/>
                                                <Input width="300px" id="idu_admin" required="true" placeholder="username@mail.com" submit="onEmailSignin"/>
                                                <Label design="Bold" text="Enter Password" required="true"/>
                                                <Input width="300px" id="idp_admin" required="true" type="Password" placeholder="*****" submit="onEmailSignin"/>
                                                <HBox>
                                                    <Button width="145px" class="sapUiTinyMarginEnd" text="Sign In" press="onEmailSignin"/>
                                                    <Button width="145px" text="Reset" press="onReset"/>
                                                </HBox>
                                            </VBox>
                                        </IconTabFilter>
                                    </items>
                                </IconTabBar>
                            </HBox>
                        </VBox>
                    </content>
                </Page>
                </pages>
</mvc:View>

this is view1 controller

sap.ui.define([
    "sap/ui/core/mvc/Controller"
], (Controller) => {
    "use strict";

    return Controller.extend("firebaselogin.controller.View1", {
        onInit() {
            
        },
        onEmailSignin: function (oEvent) {
            var that = this;
            sap.ui.core.BusyIndicator.show();
            var email = this.byId("idu_admin").getValue();
            var password = this.byId("idp_admin").getValue();
            var errorMessage = "";
            // Create a Fireauth Auth reference
            var oModel = this.getView().getModel("fbModel").getData();
            var fireAuth = oModel.fireAuth;
            // var firestoreData = oModel.firestore;
            fireAuth.signInWithEmailAndPassword(email, password).then(function (usersigned) {
                sap.ui.core.BusyIndicator.hide();
                MessageBox.success("You are Logged in!");
                that.onReset();
            }).catch(function (error) {
                sap.ui.core.BusyIndicator.hide();
                // Handle Errors here.
                errorMessage = error.message;
                MessageBox.error(errorMessage);
            });
        },

        onReset: function (oEvent) {
            this.byId("idu_admin").setValue("");
            this.byId("idp_admin").setValue("");
        }
    });
});

entry.title: SAP ENABLE NOW - CHANGING PDF FILE NAME
entry.content: We need to provide our customer with the ability to download a PDF file from SAP ENABLE NOW that aligns with the project standards. To achieve this, we are using a custom template to export the PDF from Enable Now. However, the generated file name is always <our template name>.pdf. Is there any ways to solve it? Much appreciated.

entry.title: Digital badge didn't receive
entry.content:
Digital Badge not received after passing the certification

on 21st April 2025, I completed the certification C_TS4FI_2023. After successfully completing the exam, i received a mail that i have passed the exam. However, I have not received any follow on mail to claim the digital badge, and also when I check certification tab under 'My learnings' section the certificate is not available.

What should I do ?

entry.content: Wrongly post

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.2 中的新增功能：MIGO对生产订单/预留投料可自动确定仓库仓位（Bin位）
entry.content:
在支持公有云客户的过程中，收到好几家使用了cloud WM的公有云客户有直接MIGO对生产订单进行组件投料并确定Bin位的业务需求。事实上在使用MIGO对生产订单进行组件投料的时候，系统有库存确定和批次确定的功能，但在之前的系统版本中却不能自动推荐库存所在仓库存储的物理Bin位，这对用户的操作造成了不便，同时也不利于仓库货物移动效率的提升。

在收到客户诉求反馈后，ERP公有云cloud WM产品团队评估了客户提出此诉求的合理性和优先级，经过产品开发，从ERP公有云2502.2版本开始，启用了cloud WM的公有云客户，可以直接在MIGO中对生产订单投料的时候由系统推荐并确定Bin位（具体参数：MIGO，移动类型261，对生产订单或者预留进行直接发货过账操作），详细功能请参考以下功能测试结果。请注意以下截屏为内部系统测试数据，具体测试结果请以客户系统实际为准。

首先在内部系统中创建一张生产订单并发布以待发料，组件选择从WM管理库存地点发料，如下显示：

其次进入MIGO界面投料：

 

 

 

 

点击post，发货过账成功，查看结果如下：

 

查看仓库管理监控器中的仓库库存变化：

 

请注意：仓库自动确定并推荐批次需要完善仓库管理相关配置，也可定义出库规则，如先进先出、后进先出等，系统根据配置的库位搜索策略找到合适的库存。具体配置如下：

 

 

 

 

 

若生产订单中BOM组件物料维护了production supply area，同时该物料也维护了control cycle for WM（bin位字段维护值），则MIGO默认对生产订单组件发料时可带出维护的默认Bin位，对默认Bin位不满意可以在MIGO中使用以上auto bin的功能由系统根据规则自动确定Bin位，若对推荐的Bin位仍不满意，可以手工维护优先级更高的Bin位，进行组件的最终发料过账。需要注意的是，手工指认Bin位的同时也需要对批次进行相应的更新。

目前公有云系统中cloud WM仓库管理功能已非常强大，不管是物料的物理货架管理，还是仓库的出入库流程、手持终端扫码需求抑或是系统集成需求，都已有相应并完善的产品功能进行支持。推荐有仓库管理需求的客户优先使用ERP公有云中自带的免费仓库管理功能（cloud WM），在使用过程中，有产品功能相关反馈欢迎与我们联系，谢谢。

关于以上提到的MIGO auto-bin功能，更多功能更新说明文档，可参考SAP Help文档：SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.2 中的新增功能：直接发货过账期间的自动仓位确定

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere External Access Overview: APIs, CLI and SQL
entry.content: Great Post !! Thanks for sharing

entry.title: Re: Error while connecting sap UI5 Application in BAS usi...
entry.content: how about removing <pages> in your view

entry.title: Exactly once in order (EOIO) for Group messages using Advanced Event Mesh
entry.content:
Hi there,

We have recently introduced SAP Advanced Event Mesh (AEM), which under the hood is ‘Solace PubSub+ Cloud’ in our Integration Landscape, and now I am seeking for the best way to implement ‘Exactly Once In Order’ Sequencing in our Integration.

We are on Version 10.9.1.114-0.

The Integration is going to do the following:

  1. Source System will Publish the Switching Job details (XML) to SAP AEM from WebLogic JMS Server.
  2. We have another SAP Integration Layer which then subscribes to the Solace Queue (or Topic), does Message Transformation, and then forwards that to External System.

The Challenge:

We want messages belonging to one Job (lets say Job A), should be delivered to External System in Sequence. Lets say Job A has Operation 1, 2 and 3. If for some reason Operation 2 fails to get delivered to External System, Job 3 should not go. However, Job B and it’s Operations can continue to go as usual.

So, we need FIFO for individual Job Operation, and not across all the Job Operations.

Analysis done so far:

  1. We can create One Exclusive Queue and One DMQ for the process, and Publish everything there. By doing it all the Jobs and their Operations will follow Sequence by Default. In All the Success scenarios, this should be okay (I guess). But in case of failure, the message will move to DMQ and the Subsequent message for one Job will not know and ‘might’ get processed.
  2. I went through Partition Queues, but that doesn’t seem to fit the purpose, as there the messages (Job Operations in our case) of one Job can go to any Partition
  3. Non-Durable (Temporary) Queues: What I have understood so far, we can request the Publisher (Client) to create Queues Dynamically and all the messages (Operation) of one Job should be sent to ONE Queue. As soon as those messages are consumed by our SAP Integration and forwarded to Externally System, these Queues get deleted - I am not 100% sure if this is how this will behave. In case of failures, I would expect the Queue remains intact and messages belonging to that Queue will pile up, without impacting the other Jobs.
  4. We can introduce a persistence layer to store the failed messages. Every message consumed from the queue will first be checked (using some checksum) to see if any message for that Operation has failed in the past and if yes, the push the message to DMQ or else continue normal. I will then have to keep DMQ and this persistence layer in sync. Or just use this persistence and not DMQ.

Following things are Mandatory:

  1. Guaranteed Delivery of the messages to External System
  2. Order of Operations belonging to same Job should be maintained
  3. Order for Different Jobs is not Mandatory, and those can be parallelly processed.

Any help on this would be really appreciated.

-Anuj

entry.title: Re: How to manage Start Retrofit action under Transport M...
entry.content:
To disable the "Start Retrofit" option in the Transport Management Assignment block within SAP Solution Manager (SOLMAN) Change Control Management, follow these steps:

  1. Access SAP Configuration:

    • Go to transaction SM34 and open the view cluster /TMWFLOW/VC_CTS_DIS.

  2. Adjust Retrofit Settings:

    • Within the cluster, locate your CTS Project Settings or Retrofit Settings.

    • Choose the relevant project or landscape and uncheck the Retrofit Enabled option or similar setting that activates the retrofit feature.

  3. Save and Transport:

    • Save your changes and transport them if needed, depending on your system landscape.

  4. Refresh the UI or Restart Application:

    • A UI refresh or restarting services (e.g., via SICF) may be required for the changes to take full effect.

Once completed, the "Start Retrofit" option will no longer be visible or accessible in the Transport Management block.

Just like professionals seek CMI Level 6 Assignment Help to navigate complex academic content, customizing SAP Solution Manager features like this often benefits from precise, guided steps to avoid confusion and ensure correct configuration.

entry.title: Re: Object does not exist in Smartforms
entry.content: Hi, can you pass me the 2 notes ? I dont have access

entry.title: Re: SAP Group Reporting - Block tasks in Consolidation an...
entry.content:
Hi,

All tasks in the data monitor must be blocked before the period can be closed. Tasks with errors or warnings need to be locked with block by user. Same applies for the consolidation monitor.

Best regards

entry.title: Creation of SAP HANA Database Instance in SAP BTP Trial
entry.content:
Introduction:

SAP HANA Cloud is a database as a service (DBaaS) , provides a single place to access, store, and process all enterprise data in real time with high availability .You can develop smart applications with embedded machine learning , analytics (advanced data processing capabilities , insights ) ,document store . SAP HANA Cloud provides all of the advanced SAP HANA technologies for multi-model data processing ,store and access data in-memory and column-based [ it Process mission-critical data at proven in-memory speed] or on disk . By combining in-memory storage with columnar store, data operations are performed faster than in a traditional database with a disk-based storage. Using SAP HANA Cloud, you can set up and manage SAP HANA databases and bind them to applications running on SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) or elsewhere. You can benefit from cloud qualities such as availability, security, automatic software updates, elasticity, and low total cost of ownership by using SAP HANA Cloud either as a stand-alone solution or as an extension to your existing on-premise environment.

1. Open SAP BTP  Cockpit and click on subaccount.

2. Click on Instances and Subscriptions and then click on create button. 

3. Select Service as SAP HANA Cloud and Plan as tools. 

4. SAP HANA Cloud is now subscribed. 

5. Click on Security -> Users and select the user. 

6. Click on Assign Role Collection. 

7. Assign the following three roles. 

8. Click on SAP HANA Cloud Application; it will open in new window(Hana Cloud Central). 

9. Click on create Instance. 

10. Select SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA Database and Next Step 

11. Provide the instance name and password (next step). 

12. Click on Next Step. 

13. Click on Next Step. 

14. Select Allow all IP addresses, Enable Cloud Connector, and select Allow all IP addresses --> Next Step. 

15. Click on Review and Create(No need to select Data Lake). 

16. Click on Create Instance. 

17. Wait until the Instance status turns into Running state and click on Actions three dots. 

18. Go to Open in SAP HANA Database Explorer; it will open in new window. 

  1. Enter the Credentials 

Username: DBADMIN   

Password: “use the password which was created at previous steps”. 

  1. Click on SQL Console Icon at the top left. 

Now the SAP HANA Database is ready to use. 

Conclusion:

Here in this post I have completed only setting up Hana Cloud Instance, but this is only the first part of my blog. I will be completing my blogs by working on Hana Database Integration HDI, schemas and tables in Hana Database Instance. I will be posting this in my up coming blog.

entry.title: Smartforms repeat header in a loop
entry.content:
Hi everyone 

I have 10 loops in the main window,

 

When I see the pdf

First page

Second page, repeat the header in the second page.

When there are fewer records in the first loop this does not happen for example.

Fist page

Second page, header is repeated on both pages.

entry.title: SAP Datasphere CLI & Python: Exporting Modeling Objects to CSV Files for Each Artifact
entry.content:
Introduction

In this blog post, we'll explore how to use Python alongside SAP Datasphere CLI to extract modeling objects and export them to CSV files. The script allows users to handle artifacts such as remote tables, views, replication flows, and more, for each space in SAP Datasphere.
This solution is particularly useful for automating repetitive tasks and ensuring structured data handling across different modeling objects

Prerequisites

Steps to install SAP Datasphere CLI: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/d0ecd6f297ac40249072a44df0549c1a/f7d5eddf20a34a1aa48d8e2c68a44e28.html/ 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-datasphere-external-access-overview-apis-cli-and-sql/bc-p/14086942#M180986/ 

Step-by-Step Process

Step 1: Prepare Login.Json file

Create OAuth Client with Purpose as Interactive Usage and Redirect URL as http://localhost:8080

Get the value of all below fields from the OAuth Client and prepare the Login.json file.

{
"client_id": "",
"client_secret": "",
"authorization_url": "",
"token_url": "",
"access_token": "",
"refresh_token": ""
}

 Step 2: Create Model_Object.py file with below code

dsp host : give URL of Datasphere Tenant.

secrets_file : Give Path of Login.json file.

import subprocess
import pandas as pd
import sys

def manage_Modeling_Object(Modeling_Object):
    # Step 1: Login to Datasphere using host and secrets file
    dsp_host = '<URL of Datasphere>'
    secrets_file = '<path>/Login.json'
    command = f'datasphere login --host {dsp_host} --secrets-file {secrets_file}'
    subprocess.run(command, shell=True)  # Execute the login command
    
    # Step 2: Retrieve a list of all spaces in JSON format
    command = ['datasphere', 'spaces', 'list', '--json']
    result_spaces = subprocess.run(command, capture_output=True, shell=True, text=True)  # Run the command and capture output
    
    # Step 3: Parse the list of spaces from the command's output
    spaces = result_spaces.stdout.splitlines()  # Split output into individual lines
    
    ModelingObject_data = []  # Initialize a list to store Modeling Object data
    
    # Step 4: Check if the Modeling Object is 'spaces'
    if Modeling_Object == 'spaces':
        for space in spaces:
            if space == "[" or space == "]":
                continue  # Skip brackets in the JSON output
            space_id = space.strip()  # Extract space ID
            
            # Add space details to the data list
            ModelingObject_data.append({
                'Space ID': space_id.replace('"', '').replace(',', ''),
                'Technical Name': space_id.replace('"', '').replace(',', ''),
                'TYPE': Modeling_Object[:-1].upper()  # Set the TYPE as uppercase version of the input Modeling Object name
            })
    
    # Step 5: Process Modeling Objects for each space
    else:
        for space in spaces:
            if space == "[" or space == "]":
                continue  # Skip brackets in the JSON output
            space_id = space.strip()  # Extract space ID
            
            # Step 6: Retrieve Modeling Objects for the current space
            command = ['datasphere', 'objects', Modeling_Object, 'list', '--space', space_id.replace('"', '').replace(',', '')]
            result_ModelingObject = subprocess.run(command, capture_output=True, shell=True, text=True)  # Run the command
            
            # Step 7: Parse the Modeling Object data from the output
            ModelingObject_info = result_ModelingObject.stdout.splitlines()  # Split output into individual lines
            print("Checking "+Modeling_Object.upper()+" for space : "+space_id.replace('"', '').replace(',', ''))  # Log the space being checked
            
            # Step 8: Process each Modeling Object
            if len(ModelingObject_info) > 1:
                for flow in ModelingObject_info:
                    if '{' in flow or '}' in flow or '[' in flow or ']' in flow:
                        continue  # Skip brackets or braces in the output
                    cleaned_flow = flow.replace('"technicalName":', '').replace('"', '').strip()  # Clean up the output
                    
                    # Step 9: Add Modeling Object details to the data list
                    ModelingObject_data.append({
                        'Space ID': space_id.replace('"', '').replace(',', ''),
                        'Technical Name': cleaned_flow,
                        'TYPE': Modeling_Object[:-1].upper()  # Set the TYPE as uppercase version of the input Modeling Object name
                    })
    
    # Step 10: Write the collected data into a CSV file
    if ModelingObject_data:
        df = pd.DataFrame(ModelingObject_data)  # Create a DataFrame from the data list
        df.to_csv(Modeling_Object.upper()+'.csv', index=False)  # Save the DataFrame to a CSV file without the index
        print("Space vise all "+Modeling_Object.upper()+" have been written to "+Modeling_Object.upper()+".csv.")  # Log success message
    else:
        print("No Modeling Objects found.")  # Log message if no data was collected
    
    print('------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------')  # Separator for readability
        
if __name__ == "__main__":
    # Check if an argument is provided via the command line
    if len(sys.argv) > 1:
        # Pass the first argument to the method
        manage_Modeling_Object(sys.argv[1])
    else:
        print("Please provide a Modeling Object name as an argument.")  # Log error message if no argument is provided
        
# Execute for predefined Modeling Objects
manage_Modeling_Object('remote-tables')
manage_Modeling_Object('local-tables')
manage_Modeling_Object('views')
manage_Modeling_Object('intelligent-lookups')
manage_Modeling_Object('data-flows')
manage_Modeling_Object('replication-flows')
manage_Modeling_Object('transformation-flows')
manage_Modeling_Object('task-chains')
manage_Modeling_Object('analytic-models')
manage_Modeling_Object('data-access-controls')

Step 3: Open command prompt and execute the Model_Objects.py file

Once the program execution is done it will generate CSV files for all the Datasphere artifactes mention in python code

each CSV file will have 3 columns : 

1) Space ID : Name of the space

2) Technical Name : Exact Technical Name of Object 

3) Type : Type of Object ( i.e view, local-table, remote-table, replication flw etc)

 

Conclusion

This script demonstrates how Python and SAP Datasphere CLI can collaborate to streamline artifact management and export data systematically. By following the steps provided, users can extend or adapt the code to suit their requirements.

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK - search filter does not work for some letter...
entry.content:
Hi, This is Offline OData configuration issue. Can you please apply the following SAP note?

https://me.sap.com/notes/0002793040

The application configuration file should be in the Mobile Service BTP

entry.title: Re: SAP Asset Manager 2405 – Extend Device Login Session...
entry.content: Did you change the passcode policy in the BTP mobile service? There is the Expiration time frame under the passcode policy that you can check and set to 60 days to test if it works.

entry.title: Re: Create a SQL user with access to multiple spaces in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi

same thing we can achived by following below steps.

Step 1: Create a DB User at the Tenant Level

Step 2: Note Down Tenant Details

Step 3: Create a SAP HANA Cloud Connection for Space with Host, Port,Username, Password for DB User.

Step 4: Use the Connection in View to see all artifactes.

Thanks

Vikas

entry.title: SAP Workzone Content Provider from another subaccount error - Design Time Destination
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We are trying to configure a content provider in our SAP WZ subaccount. This content provider is from another BTP subaccount where we have UI5 apps deployed. We are following the blog as follows:

Simplifying HTML5 Content Consumption Across Subac... - SAP Community

Whilst we are creating the content provider in the SAP WZ subaccount we are getting the error as follows:

<Connectivity/NotFound>: Could not fetch the content from the design-time destination. Please verify that the URL is correct.

The destination looks as follows:

With endpoint URL as follows:

https://html5-apps-repo-rt.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/applications/cdm/log-rf-kanban-replenishment-ui5

Any idea about what the error can be?

Thanks in advance.

C.

entry.title: Re: Excel add-in sac planning
entry.content: Not sure what's your real question is. Excel add-in of SAC supports planning.

entry.title: Re: Simplifying HTML5 Content Consumption Across Subaccounts
entry.content:
Greetings!

Thank @rupambhatta  for this blog.

I am trying to do the configuration in our landscape but getting an error whilst creating the content provider.

<Connectivity/NotFound>: Could not fetch the content from the design-time destination. Please verify that the URL is correct.

@davide_bramati I see that you faced the same issue, did you mange to solve it?

I have created a question at the community with more details.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-workzone-content-provider-from-another-subaccount-error-design-time/qaq-p/14087086#M4911922

Thanks in advance!

C.

entry.title: Re: Free SAP Certification and practice systems for students & lecturers
entry.content: Hi @David_Chaviano  we don't have email address associated  with university we just used our registration number to login to our university portal  which are just digits just like this 2021---- when I tried   for verifying Registration number it doesn't recognized as email when I tried it another way and put my url of my university portal login first it doesn't recognize it as url  after trying few times it takes to another site I was trying to access icmap but it takes me to the hec website which is universities regulation site I uploaded my documents and I received confirmation email from sheers that my student verification is successful will I be able to receive access to sap student hub or should I try another way I also applied previously for the free certification but I didn't receive attempt please help me

entry.title: Re: SAC previous year quantity calculation by week
entry.content: You can try to use restricted measure to have last year value.

entry.title: Re: Updating Dimension Attributes in a model
entry.content:
Still not clear on what are you trying to achieve and what real difficulties you are facing. 

  1. By saying 'YTD values are derived from monthly wages', are you calculating YTD from periodic value via calculated measure? 
  2. I guess not only March's YTD is from file, but also previous months of 2025, right? 
  3. Why you need separate model for this? But not just a different version and measure in same model? 

  To me, a simlper way is to just to load periodic value from file for month Jan, Feb and March into the working forecast version, then restricted measure can calcualte YTD on the fly for all your periods on the fly.

entry.title: Re: Issue with Ariba Contract Retrieval API for date filter
entry.content:
hi,

Did you got solution for this? I am also facing same error.

entry.title: New Feature: MIGO Can Auto-Determine Warehouse Bin for Production Order/Reservation in 2502.2
entry.content:
During the process of supporting ERP Public Cloud customers, we have received requests from several customers using Cloud WM on public cloud for a direct component issue to production orders through MIGO, with the functionality to determine Bin locations. Although MIGO allows for stock determination and batch determination when issuing components to production orders, previous system versions did not automatically suggest the physical Bin locations where the stock is stored. This limitation has inconvenienced users and hindered operational efficiency.

After receiving feedback from customers on these demands, the ERP public cloud Cloud WM product team assessed the reasonableness and priority of these requests. Following product development, starting from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.2, customers enabled with Cloud WM can now have Bin locations determined by the system directly in MIGO during component issue to production orders (MIGO, movement type 261, for goods issue to production orders or reservations). For detailed functionalities, please refer to the following test results.

First, create a production order in the internal system, with components issued from an WM-managed storage location, as shown below:

 

Next, proceed to the MIGO transaction for component issue. Initially, the batch and bin location fields are empty. After clicking the "auto bin" button, the system will automatically find the appropriate bin location and batch based on predefined rules and populate these fields on the screen.

 

 

 

 

 

Click Post button and goods issue was posted successfully:

 

Inspect the warehouse stock in the Warehouse Management Monitor application:

 

Automatic warehouse determination and batch recommendation require comprehensive warehouse management configurations. You can also define outbound rules, such as FIFO (First-In-First-Out) or LIFO (Last-In-First-Out), where the system will find the appropriate stock based on the configured inventory search strategy.

 

 

 

 

 

If a production supply area is maintained for BOM components in the production order, and the material also has a control cycle for WM (with the Bin location field maintained), then MIGO can default to the specified Bin location when issuing components to the production order. If the default Bin location is not satisfactory, you can use the auto Bin determination feature in MIGO, where the system automatically determines the Bin location according to rules. If the recommended Bin location is still not satisfactory, you can manually specify a higher-priority Bin location for the final component issue posting. It is important to note that when manually specifying a Bin location, you also need to update the batch accordingly.

 

The Cloud WM functionality in the public cloud system is currently quite robust. Whether it's shelf management for materials, warehouse inbound and outbound operations, handheld terminal scanning requirements, or system integration needs, there is comprehensive product support available. We recommend that customers with warehouse management needs prioritize using the free built-in warehouse management features (Cloud WM) in the ERP public cloud. If you have any product-related feedback during use, please feel free to contact us. Thank you.

 

For more detailed information and updates on the MIGO auto-bin functionality, you can refer to the SAP Help documentation: What's New in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502.2: Automatic Bin Determination During Direct Goods Issue Posting.

entry.title: SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition
entry.content:
Were you also struggling to subscribe to the SAP Build Work Zone Standard Edition on April 26, 2025? I finally managed to add the service—here's how!

I detailed below how to make it happen.


General Process

Here are the steps we will follow:

  1. Include a service to authorize program access.
  2. Add new roles.
  3. Subscribe to our SAP Build Work Zone, Standard Edition.

Include a service to authorize program access.

  1. Let's add Cloud Identity Services

  2. Click on Go to Application



  3. Check you email
  4. Create an account for this service
  5. Navigate to Identity Providers --> Corporate Identity Providers
  6. Click on "Create," and name it (e.g., SAP Build Standard).



  7. Scroll down to the Single Sign-On section to toggle on "Forward All SSO Requests to Corporate IdP"
  8. Leave this open; we'll return shortly.

Add new roles 

This step is straightforward but can be a bit tricky:

  1. Navigate to your subaccount

  2. Go to security --> role collection

  3. Look for "Launchpad Admin", "Subaccount Service Administrator", and "Subaccount Service Viewer" 

     

  4. Assign your user to these three roles

Subscribe to SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition 

Now it's time to add the service. Please note, an additional step is required:

  1. Add the service "SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition"
  2. Return to Cloud Identity Services.
  3. Navigate to the Applications & Resources --> bundled applications.
  4. Select SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition (trial)
  5. In the trust section, toggle on "Trust All Corporate Identity."

Fingers crossed, everything should now work smoothly!

If you encounter any issues, here's an alternative approach:

  • Go to the Global Account → Booster.
  • Search for an application like "SAP Build App" and execute it.
  • If another user is created, assign the previously mentioned roles and retry.

I hope this helps you all!

Byron Carvajal

entry.title: Re: Home Address sync from EC>EP>CP
entry.content: Were you able to resolve this issue

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition Subscription failed
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have found a way to make it happen. 
Click here and follow the steps
👇🏼👇🏼👇🏼
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-build-work-zone-standard-edition/ba-p/14087118

entry.title: Re: Calling OData services in SAP Digital Mnaufacturing
entry.content:
Hi Harsh-ctrl, i know that has been a while but...

 

1) i dont know if you are using Cloud Connector or not, but i'm assuming YES

2) you should use only http://{host}:{port}  on VIRTUAL HOST on servers

3) on your custom service registry you should attach your WebServer (as you did) but on the url/path you should not attach the entire url, but just the path that arrives by removing the web servers path, like this:

Path WebServer host/virtual url:  https://xxxx.yyyyy.com:443  (the same configured inside Cloud Connector)

 
Path Service Registry: /sap/opu/odata/SAP/XXXXXXXXXXXX/A_bbbbbbb

entry.title: Re: Calling OData services in SAP Digital Mnaufacturing
entry.content:
@cicero1988 for your issue:

- check user and password on SAP BTP destination, check that they are working fine
- second check: check inside your production process that the destination has been selected!

Let me know

entry.title: Re: Calling OData services in SAP Digital Mnaufacturing
entry.content: to be removed

entry.title: Re: Physical path for logical file
entry.content:
Hi,

Create the directories in such a way that it is under a single common directory, the common directory can be maintained in SFILE so that all the directories under the common directory can be used for uploading via CG3Z.

Best Regards,

Anirudh P S

entry.title: Re: P&G - New Step in the Route Map when rejecting the form
entry.content: Hello there is no way of auto route step creation based on reject button

entry.title: Re: S/4 HANA Extensibility – Guide to extend API_BUSINESS_PARTNER API for Standard Fields
entry.content: Would it work for update as well or is it only for reading data?

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Variable Prompt
entry.content:
Hi,

What you are seeing is the standard behaviour for ‘F4’ help in BEx queries. This is governed by the backend in BW. In order to have ‘cascading’ variables you would need to implement the BADI RSR_VARIABLE_F4_RESTRICT in BW. See https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/bex-cascading-variable/qaq-p/11895992 for example. 
Cheers, Ivan.

entry.title: Re: Extract configuration from Integration Design artifacts via API
entry.content:
Hi Javier,

can you pls share where/what you needed to change, to have it working in Cloud Foundry. there is error - probably you had the same...

BR

Mateusz

entry.title: Re: SAP Workzone Content Provider from another subaccount error - Design Time Destination
entry.content: Hello, To help me understand the issue better, could you please provide the following details of your destination configuration: URL: Please provide the exact URL you're using. Authentication Method: What authentication method are you using (e.g., NoAuthentication, BasicAuthentication, OAuth2ClientCredentials)? Additional Properties: Are there any additional properties configured for the destination? If so, please provide their names and values. Providing these details will help me analyze the configuration and identify potential issues.

entry.title: Hi, I am facing the same issue.Can you share how you solved it?
SAP Hana not starting after upgrade (localsecurestore not starting up)
entry.content:
Hi,

After an upgrade of our HANA from 2.00.081 to 2.00.083 the HANA does not start up correctly. When running HDB start I can clearly see that all components are starting up and are working fine except localsecurestore. I not able to access the database using HANA studio, the startup process never finishes. The main error I encounter at the daemon log file are:

Daemon.cpp(00756) : Found terminated and planned instance 0 of program 'localsecurestore'

This line is always popping up every 30 seconds in the logs as seen above.

I have found another post with this issue, but no solution was posted.

Anyone has an idea of how to solve this?

I have opened a case with sap but have not got an answer yet.

Any help would really be appreciated.

Regards,

entry.title: SAP Datasphere and SAP HANA Cloud — Technical Activities During Table/View Creation, Persistence
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I would appreciate your guidance on the following questions related to SAP Datasphere and SAP HANA Cloud:

When we create a table in SAP Datasphere:

  • What operations are performed on the underlying SAP HANA Cloud database?

  • Is a physical table immediately created in HANA Cloud?

  • Are there any additional metadata artifacts generated at this stage?

When we create a view in SAP Datasphere:

  • How is this view represented on the HANA Cloud database side (e.g., SQL view, calculation view)?

  • Is any temporary or runtime structure created immediately?

When we persist data:

  • Into a table:
    What activities occur in HANA Cloud during data persistence into an existing Datasphere table?

  • Into a view (after enabling persistence):
    How is the persisted data stored in the underlying database?
    Is a new table automatically created? If yes, what is its structure relative to the original view definition?

 Regarding Partitioning and Data Loading:

  • When partitions are created on a Datasphere table or persisted view:

    • What database-level changes happen on SAP HANA Cloud?

  • When we load data into these partitions:

    • Are partitions managed internally as standard HANA partitions, or handled separately?

  • When we delete specific partitions or delete all partitions:

    • What database activities happen during this operation?

General Runtime Activities:

  • During all these operations (table/view creation, persistence, partitioning, deletion), what are the typical HANA Cloud runtime actions (e.g., commits, locks, internal optimizations, delta merges)?

Any insights, technical explanations, or references to SAP Datasphere documentation would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance for your support!

entry.title: BTP Trial Account: Cloud Connector disconnected
entry.content:
I am using a BTP Trial Account to prepare for the Low Code/No Code Certification.

I was previously (a few weeks ago) able to create Processes in my Trial Account without any issues.
Now, when trying to create a new Process or edit one which was already created, I am faced with this constant error popup :

"Request failed with status code 400
Unable to recognize the artifact type [notificationtemplate]"

Upon checking SAP For Me for similar errors I could not find anything. The closest I could find were issues relating to the Cloud Connector.

So, I checked in my Trial Account > Connectivity > Cloud Connectors and I can see:

There is no cloud connector connected to this subaccount.


Request Details
statusCode:404
reason:Not Found
request:/api/v1/subaccount/497134c1-e390-4384-b763-9e02eee8159e/info
timestamp:26.04.2025 12:31:33
response:<empty>

I have not knowingly changed or done anything in this account with regards to the Cloud Connector. I am assuming it has some kind of default connectivity to a Cloud Connector which is Administered by whoever takes care of Trial Accounts in general.

I have tried to contact Support but to do so it requires selecting a customer, and I do not have one - I am an SAP Employee and am using this account to prepare for the Certification. So I cannot contact Support through any standard channels

I cannot enable the Built In Support in BTP Cockpit due to below error (I assume it's related to Cloud Connector issue)

Please advise who I can contact for assistance.

entry.title: Re: Introduction to SAP DRC and Integration aspects
entry.content:
Bonjour à tous,

Je travaille actuellement avec SAP Document and Reporting Compliance (SAP DRC) et j'aimerais savoir s'il est possible d'adapter ou d'étendre la solution standard DRC pour répondre aux exigences légales et fiscales d'un pays qui n'est pas obligatoirement pris en charge par SAP.

Spécifiquement :

  • Existe-t-il des options disponibles pour créer un rapport ou un scénario personnalisé en RDC (par exemple, en créant une nouvelle activité de rapport ou un modèle de formulaire) ?

  • Existe-t-il des recommandations ou des bonnes pratiques pour développer une solution personnalisée au sein de SAP DRC tout en maintenant la conformité avec les normes SAP (en particulier pour la maintenance et les mises à niveau futures) ?

Merci beaucoup d'avance pour vos éclairages et partages d'expériences !

entry.title: Re: Accessing and Updating Transportation Charges SAP Transportation Management
entry.content:
@rajiv_kanoria : When can we expect SAP to provide functionality (API) to update the charges instead of using above logic?

There is a transportation charge node in TransportationOrderGenericRequest but as per the excel, that do not appear to be available for on-prem S/4 version. It fails with the error message

Updating transportation charges from external system not allowed (/SCMTMS/ACP Msg no 50)

We have used the above approach from the blog, but it does not work consistently. we get a message everything is successful, but data is not correctly updated.

entry.title: Re: SAP Hana not starting after upgrade (localsecurestore...
entry.content:
Hi,

It looks like the localsecurestore service failure is what’s blocking your full HANA startup after the upgrade.

This usually happens because of one of these issues:

  • Corrupted secure store (SSFS) files.

  • Wrong file permissions on the secure store.

  • Disk space issues on the server.

Here’s what you can do

  1. Check the SSFS files under $(DIR_GLOBAL)/hdb/security/ssfs/.

    • Confirm that SSFS_HDB.DAT and SSFS_HDB.KEY are present.

    • Check that they are owned by the <sid>adm user and have correct permissions (typically 600).

  2. Check disk space:

    • Use df -h to make sure your /usr/sap/ and related file systems have free space.

  3. Check traces for more clues:

    • Look at daemon_trace, nameserver_trace, and indexserver_trace files.

  4. If files are corrupted:

    • You might need to restore the SSFS files from a backup if you have one.

    • If not, SAP Support will likely need to assist you to recreate or recover it safely.

Since you already raised an SAP case, keep it open. if it's a deeper SSFS corruption or version-specific issue with 2.00.083, they may also provide a patch or fix note

entry.title: Re: Extract configuration from Integration Design artifacts via API
entry.content: This sounds like a really useful project! Being able to visualize all the scheduled iFlows would definitely make it easier to manage and keep track of everything. Good luck with building it!

entry.title: Re: VAX/VAY and Cost element
entry.content: The VAX & VAY GL accounts have also been remained one of the areas of confusion for me as well but I found only solution avert this confusion which is to maintain the same GL account with cost element category in the both the modifiers ( VAX & VAY).

entry.title: Re: Updating Dimension Attributes in a model
entry.content:
Thanks @William_Yu for your response.

Background:
We use annual salaries from SF (loaded as Actuals) and split them into monthly forecasts using SAC Data Actions to calculate future YTD values.

New Requirement:

  • Use external YTD values for the last month of each quarter (e.g., March 2025).
  • Example: For April 2025, YTD = March’s YTD (from file) + April’s SAC-calculated salary.

Issue:

  • The Company Code is missing for the March 2025 YTD record (loaded from the file), causing reporting issues in the story.
  • Without Company Code, the story cannot display YTD values correctly.

Data Loaded from file

ID

Period

YTD

Data Src

Cost Center

Comp Code

1234

202503

45,000

PROLL_YTD

#

#

 After Copying to forecast

ID

Period

YTD

Data Src

Cost Center

Comp Code

1234

202503

45,000

WK-FCST

CC1

#

 Ask:
Need help dynamically updating the Company Code for these records (tried RESULTLOOKUP without success).

I hope I was able to better explain.

Thanks,

PS

entry.title: Re: Depreciation expense decreasing the budget loaded in...
entry.content:
Hi,

If you do not want to record depreciation expenses on WBS element from assets, simply do not assign a WBS element to the asset but just a cost center. You also could define a validation rule to prevent erroneous input from end-users during asset creation.

Best regards,

 Mick

entry.title: Unveiling SAP Signavio's April 2025 Release: A Leap Forward in Business Process Transformation
Re: Landscape and Portrait Format - Adobe Forms
entry.content: We have also got this requirement, didn't find any solution and we decided to create the Layout from scratch. Earlier the form was designed in Landscape mode so we decided to design new form from scratch in Portrait mode.
